zh.Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland: 蘇格蘭凱特內斯登亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer是Chalmers和Unkown MacNeil的女兒，於1397年9月28日出生在蘇格蘭。她於大約1422年與Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年7月20日享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾。

zh-hans.Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland: 苏格兰凱特內斯登亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer是Chalmers和Unkown MacNeil的女儿，于1397年9月28日出生在苏格兰。她于大约1422年与Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年7月20日享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Chalmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from Older Scots chalmer ‘chamberlain’; compare Chambers . The mb was assimilated to mm; the l was purely graphic, indicating that the preceding a was long.
English: possibly a localized form of Challinor (see Challender ), with dissimilation of ln to lm in Chalner.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer was born on 28 September 1397, in Scotland as the daughter of Chalmers and Unkown MacNeil. She married Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath about 1422. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 July 1448, at the age of 50, and was buried in Cromartyshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer est née le 28 septembre 1397, à Écosse, fille de Chalmers et Unkown MacNeil. Elle a épousé Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath environ 1422. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1448, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Cromartyshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer wurde am 28. September 1397 in Scotland, als Tochter von Chalmers und Unkown MacNeil geboren. Sie hat um 1422 Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1448 im Alter von 50 Jahren und wurde in Cromartyshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer è nata il il 28 settembre 1397 nel Scotland come figlia di Chalmers e Unkown MacNeil. Lei sposato Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath circa 1422. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1448, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Cromartyshire, Scotland.

ja.Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland: スコットランドケイスネスダンベアス
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmerは1397年9月28日にスコットランドでChalmersとUnkown MacNeilの娘として生まれた。約1422年にAlexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年7月20日に50歳で死去し，スコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer(은)는 1397년 9월 28일 스컷랜드에서 Chalmers(와)과 Unkown MacNeil의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1422년 Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 7월 20일 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에 묻혔다.

pt.28 September 1397–20 July 1448: 28 de setembro de 1397–20 de julho de 1448
pt.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer nasceu em 28 de setembro de 1397, em Scotland filha de Chalmers e Unkown MacNeil. Ela casou-se com Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath aproximadamente 1422. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1448, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Cromartyshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer родилась 28 сентября 1397 г. в местности Шотландия. Её родителей звали Chalmers и Unkown MacNeil. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath около 1422 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 июля 1448 г. в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности кромертишир, Шотландия.

es.28 September 1397–20 July 1448: 28 de septiembre de 1397–20 de julio de 1448
es.lifeSummary: Catherine Chalmer nació el 28 de septiembre de 1397, en Scotland como hija de Chalmers y Unkown MacNeil. Se casó con Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath aproximadamente 1422. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1448, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Cromartyshire, Scotland.
